description: Wasm linking demo: TinyGo consumer + C++ Wasm static libs + webapp + bundled CLI

notes: Creates a minimal Wasm linking demo with staged assets and inline module outputs.
The webapp stages top.wasm and wasm-inline/{index,cpp,py}.js into dist.
The CLI app bundles single-file outputs for Go, C++, and Python inline modules.
The C++ Wasm libs use header_deps + link_deps, and the TinyGo module links via link_deps with transitive closure.
The C++ inline module is built via the Emscripten planner template and exported as a .wasm file.
The Python inline module exports a Pyodide side module as a .wasm file.
